songs.title: Way Back Into Love
songs.album: Music And Lyrics - Music From and Inspired By The Motion Picture (International Release)
feed: “Way Back Into Love” by Hugh Grant reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Way Back Into Love” by Hugh Grant reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 23 spots to #1.
“Way Back Into Love” by Hugh Grant climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 23 spots to #1.
“Way Back Into Love” by Hugh Grant is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 140 streams units.
“Way Back Into Love” by Hugh Grant is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 221,270 total units.
